'''Criton's Point''' was a quarantined [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Myto sector/Legends|Myto sector]]. Its [[Library of Xer]] was built [[26,000 BBY/Legends|26,000 BBY]]. Not much was known of the planet, but many historians had expressed interest in gaining access to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-controlled [[Library/Legends|library]].

The [[Pentastar Alignment]] and the [[Commerce Master Commissioner]] of the [[Velcar Free Commerce Zone]] had strictly prohibited all entry into the [[Star system/Legends|system]] and landings on the planet. However, a small scientific team was operating on the planet conducting archaeological excavations in the area near the library. The science team had a small settlement and a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] landing field on the planet.<ref name="PP">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref>
